title: Innovative Malaysian Myeongnan Roe Satay
description: A savory and springy Malaysian dish featuring myeongnan roe, spherified and served in a ramekin, this innovative satay is a must try for adventurous foodies, and is jain friendly.
instructions: Combine myeongnan roe, coconut milk, lime juice, palm sugar, and salt in a blender and blend until smooth.
Strain the mixture through a fine mesh sieve into a bowl.
Add sodium alginate to the mixture and stir until dissolved.
Using a syringe, drop the mixture into a bath of water to spherify.
Let the spherified myeongnan roe sit in the water bath for 10 minutes.
Remove the spherified myeongnan roe from the water bath and place in a ramekin.
Drizzle vegetable oil over the top of the myeongnan roe.
Serve the innovative Malaysian myeongnan roe satay immediately.
Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
